boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: procurement exception matches contract amendment.

SRC-D6EA566D0381-POL permits execution when source records close the exact boundary. SRC-D6EA566D0381-FBK and -BND confirm advisory buyer note does not override source-control records. boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: SRC-D6EA566D0381-CTL: 'contract amendment must cover invoice line and date is current, exact, and tied to the requested action. The record matches the actor, scope, effective date, and system boundary.'
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Prior workers fixed on missing phrasing in contract text rather than the control record's explicit confirmation. The control record is the controlling source for execution authority, not tone or request phrasing.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Authority: SRC-D6EA566D0381-CTL states contract amendment is current, exact, and tied to action. Timing: effective date confirmed. Scope: matches actor and system boundary. Dependency: invoice line and date coverage confirmed.

critical_features_preserved: Gov repair directive executed: overblock corrected
Control record accepted as authoritative over tone/phrasing
Adjacent/fallback records used appropriately as context
final_answer: AP may execute the procurement exception action. SRC-D6EA566D0381-CTL explicitly confirms the contract amendment covers invoice line and date, is current, exact, and tied to the action with matching scope and system boundary. This closes the action boundary per SRC-D6EA566D0381-POL. Advisory buyer notes in SRC-D6EA566D0381-REQ and -FBK do not override source-control records per SRC-D6EA566D0381-BND. Prior ESCALATE verdicts were overblocks; no execution-blocking defect remains.
